cases.question: Analyze the business model, pricing, payer, user, recurring revenue, and unit economics of this hybrid product-plus-subscription company.
Trace orders, backlog, delivery, revenue recognition, billing, working capital, and cash collection without combining the stages.
Normalize three statements and calculate margins, leverage, liquidity, and cash-flow ratios.
Choose comparable companies and calculate peer EV to EBITDA and price to earnings multiples.
